pr.title: Proposal: Validate ASQU on the March 22 10min/16MB control line

output.summary: Validates ASQU by swapping relu^2 for per-channel learnable squared activations on the March 22 11-layer control with gated compute stages.
techniques: Per-channel ASQU betas trained with dedicated optimizer group and low LR
Stage-gated validation campaign on the March 22 8xH100/600s/≤16 MB control line
Export tweaks keep ASQU tensors out of quantization damage
